series_metadata.series_description: File contains results of welder/brazer test for qualifying to previously qualified welding brazing procedures as required by 4101:8-15 OAC filed under company name. Welder/brazer requalifications necessary each five year period from test date.

retention_rules.disposition: Microform: Retain master microfilm in appropriate storage facility until records are no longer created by this agency. Retain diazo copy in operating area ; Paper: Microfilm existing records; new records to be kept on hard copy and microfilmed annually. After microfilm has been checked for quality and completeness then destroy hard copy records, Microform: Recycle ; Paper: Recycle
